name: Sunshine Global Circuits Co.,Ltd.
summary: Sunshine Global Circuits Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells printed circuit boards (PCBs) in China. The company offers standard, high density interconnect, rigid-flexible, aluminum plated, and special PCBs. Its products are used in various applications, such as industrial control, medical electronics, automotive electronics, telecommunication equipment, LED lighting, and other applications. The company also exports its products to Europe, North America, and Asia. Sunshine Global Circuits Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
